name: Flame Pulsar
description: Release a surge of flame, dealing 1742 Flame Damage to nearby enemies and afflicting them with Minor Mangle, reducing their Max Health by 10% for 10 seconds. Burning enemies are also hit by Pulsar Afterburn, which deals 238 Flame Damage. Pulsar Afterburn deals up to 300% more damage to enemies with less than 50% Health.
